g.title: action.hold_notification:hold->action.hold_request:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (hold) REFERENCES action.hold_request(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.hold_notification:notify_staff->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (notify_staff) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
